creator: paul@thistledew.org
text:
csum miss package                                 origin
   0  102 py26-bsddb3-5.1.1                       databases/py-bsddb3
1 of 1 packages appear to be damaged.

Files are installed in %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/bsddb3/test: 
	/usr/ports/databases/py-bsddb3]# locate test_associate.py
/usr/local/lib/python2.6/bsddb/test/test_associate.py

but the pkg-plist has them listed as going into %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/bsddb3/tests
%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/bsddb3/tests/test_associate.py

Fix: 

The pkg-plist needs to be fixed. Are these auto-generated from the install or are they related in any way?
How-To-Repeat: install databases/py-bsddb3; run pkg_validate against it.
